Document:
# UNIFORM-CLASS SERVICE SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Medium
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 2-3
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] 2x Uranium
# Warning:
Switch power gens to 45 each to keep ship thrusters on
# Shuttle Brief
"A medium sized vessel specializing in food operations."
# Piloting
[textlink="Piloting" link="Piloting"/]
[textlink="Sector Topology" link="SectorTopology"/]
# Hiring crew
[textlink="Hiring" link="Hiring"/]
As a Captain of a Spacefaring vessel, you have the authority to hire, fire, demote, or promote crew members at will.
